response:
**Subject:** Thank You & Farewell

Dear Team,

As my time here comes to an end, I want to thank each of you for the support, collaboration, and memories we’ve shared. Working alongside such talented and kind people has made this experience truly special. I’ll miss our teamwork and the positive energy you all bring every day. Please stay in touch—I’d love to keep our connections strong.

Wishing you all continued success and happiness ahead!

Best,
[Your Name]
